data.summary: Rewriting handoff email in a more casual tone — same details, friendlier voice.

steps.result: Casual rewrite ready — same key accounts and dates

fields.label: Subject
fields.value: Handing off the West Coast book — quick rundown

fields.label: Body
fields.value:
Hey Sara,

Welcome to the West Coast book! Handing over 12 accounts on May 15 — combined $1.42M LTV, $284K in open quotes, so plenty to dig into.

A few I'd flag right away:
• Magnolia Home & Garden — VIP, $482K LTV, two open quotes. Rachel Chen is the main contact, super responsive but moves fast.
• Pacific Goods — discount override stuck in approval. Worth a call before May 15 so terms don't blow up.
• Riverstone — credit limit bump pending with finance, easy nudge to keep moving.

Everything else is loaded into your CRM queue. Want to grab 30 min before the 15th to walk through it together? Just let me know what works.

Thanks,
Heman

closingText.text: Rewrote in a more casual tone — same accounts and timing, just warmer. Want me to shorten it further or keep it as-is?
